title: BEM-1152 report runners
objective:
Create file governance/runners/role_report_writer.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path


def write_report(output_path, report):
    required = {"bem_id", "role", "status", "summary", "proof"}
    missing = sorted(required - set(report))
    if missing:
        return {"ok": False, "error": f"missing fields: {missing}"}
    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    Path(output_path).write_text(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return {"ok": True, "path": output_path}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 3:
        print("usage: role_report_writer.py <report.json> <output.json>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    report = json.loads(Path(sys.argv[1]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    result = write_report(sys.argv[2], report)
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
Create file governance/runners/object_report_aggregator.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path


def aggregate(report_paths):
    reports = []
    errors = []
    for path in report_paths:
        p = Path(path)
        if not p.exists():
            errors.append(f"missing report {path}")
            continue
        reports.append(json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")))
    return {"ok": not errors, "errors": errors, "count": len(reports), "reports": reports}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    result = aggregate(sys.argv[1:])
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
